revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a crisp SNES / 16-bit pixel-art animated sprite sheet for a game effect.

Canvas and sheet contract:
- Exact final sheet size: 128x32 px.
- Grid: 1 row x 4 columns, each frame is 32x32 px.
- No visible grid lines, separators, borders, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, logos, or watermarks.
- Background must be solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling every empty pixel, with no gradients or texture.
- Every frame stays fully inside its own 32x32 cell with clear #FF00FF margin to every cell edge.
- Same effect position and scale across frames.

Subject:
- Effect only: NO character, NO body, NO face, NO armor, NO weapon object, NO creature.
- A bright mythical-Japan iai draw-cut impact effect: one single wide horizontal crescent slash of sacred white-gold light, like a lightning-fast sword draw.
- Right-facing: the crescent opens toward the RIGHT and stretches horizontally.
- Very long and thin, drawn large and wide within each cell but not touching edges.
- Vermilion inner edge, small white paper-streamer petal shapes scattering from the tips, restrained gold motes only where part of the slash breakup.
- Bright cheerful palette, sacred white-gold, warm gold, vermilion accents, top-left light source, subtle one-pixel dark outline where useful.

Animation frames left to right:
1. Thin blinding horizontal line appears, right-facing crescent just beginning, clean and centered.
2. Key frame: full maximum-length wide horizontal crescent, brightest and longest, thin white-gold body with vermilion inner edge, right-facing opening.
3. Crescent breaks into connected petal-like white streamers and gold motes from the tips; keep breakup cohesive, no stray dust specks.
4. Fading motes and tiny residual glow, very sparse but still clean and readable, no isolated random pixel islands.

Pixel-art constraints:
- Low-resolution crisp pixels only; no antialiasing blur, no soft airbrush, no smooth gradients.
- Consistent palette and pixel cluster style across all four frames.
- Clean silhouette and readable pixel clusters.
- No detached fragments: avoid isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, random dust specks, leftover effect residue, or accidental marks.

Strict avoid list:
- No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, symbols, or emblems.
- No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird, companion creature, letters, modern text, watermark, or UI.
